native.strategy: grep + sed(3-6x) + multi-Read to locate among 50 timeout hits (fuse-on-Read BREAKS at scale)

native_md.strategy: md outline / md section to slice the target module; no whole-file scan

mechanism: On a 4053-line doc with a 50x-ambiguous target value, native cannot cheaply locate the edit site (grep returns 50 hits; it sed/grep-thrashes), so its locate cost dominates. md's structural addressing (outline/section/loc) scopes to the module without scanning -> -21.3% billed. This is the one regime (N10) where native's fuse-on-Read does not hold.
caveat: N=3, search-only, HIGH variance (native 62k-148k raw). NOT a real edge until holdout-confirmed.
